S.FORM: Tom Amandes kawas tay 1959, ryax sa tay 9 nqu tay 3, Tom Amandes, squliq na Bunge'. cinkhulan sa knita' sa brbiru' Lists of actors
S.PHON: tom aman*es~ɕ kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, tom aman*es~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ

S.PHON: tom aman*es~ɕ kawas~ɕ taj ****, rjax s~ɕa taj * nqu taj *, tom aman*es~ɕ, s~ɕquliq na βuŋeʔ. ʦ~ʨinkħulan s~ɕa knitaʔ s~ɕa βrβiruʔ lis~ɕts~ɕ o* aʦ~ʨtors~ɕ
